name: Twilight Ninja Nichirin, the Chunin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たそ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>昏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がれ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>中</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ニチリン
desc:
Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can discard 1 "Ninja" monster, then activate 1 of these effects;
● This turn, "Ninja" monsters and "Ninjitsu Art" cards you control cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.
● 1 "Ninja" monster you control gains 1000 ATK until the end of this turn.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
